spot_check.build: make -C tests (clean link of SSWTests, TacticalTests)
spot_check.run: SSWTests from tests/ -> OK (297 tests), all FF-1/FF-2 cases green
spot_check.behavioral_mandate: both subtask Verifiers independently confirmed fail-against-unfixed / pass-against-fixed

follow_up_feature_requests.summary: Validate fleet m_destination (system) reference ID at load in FGame::load(), NO_DESTINATION-exempt, aborting on out-of-range non-sentinel value; prevents unguarded getSystem(destination)->addFleet NULL deref in moveFleets() on a crafted in-transit save.

Reject illegal in-transit + location-0 fleet state at load (or null-guard moveFleets() getSystem sinks); a crafted save passes FF-1's location-0 exemption then hits getSystem(0)->removeFleet NULL deref in moveFleets().

Harden FPlanet::load(): NULL-check createShip(type) before m_station->load(is), and return nonzero on its own read/nested-load failures instead of unconditionally returning 0 (which neutralizes FSystem::load()'s existing check). Unknown station type currently causes a NULL virtual-call crash.
Extend aggregate-abort return-checking to container-level scalar reads in FPlayer::load()/FFleet::load(), mirroring FF-2, closing the same silent-success class one level up.
